answer:
<think> I know that the California Golden Seals relocated to Cleveland in 1976 and became the Cleveland Barons, but they only played one season in Cleveland before relocating again. I also know that the Barons relocated to Minnesota in 1978 and became the Minnesota North Stars. I'm not aware of any other team that the Golden Seals relocated to, so I'm going to assume that the question is asking about the Minnesota North Stars. </think>
<answer> Minnesota North Stars </answer>
